text:
Sonic The Hedgehog
"Together, We Ride", from the various Fire Emblem games; the one used here is actually a medley of songs from the ORIGINAL Fire Emblem — for the Famicom (since it was never released States-side, elsewise it would've been for the NES as well) — including the music from the title screen where it shows all the different classes of guys you get to use during the course of the game.

"Together, We Ride" was used for when someone on the enemy's side wanted to join your side. Usually, you had to have Marth talk to them; if anyone else tried to talk to the character, they'd end up battling instead.

"Together, We Ride" has ALSO appeared in its Super Famicom remake (that was paired with its sequel on the same cartridge), and at least one of the GBA Fire Emblems. I think it might also have been used in Fire Emblem: Awakening, but I'm not sure about that since I have only the demo. :[

And now you know more than you ever wanted to know about the tune used in Super Smash Bros. Melee, Brawl, and 3DS/Wii U.  :D
